query:
SELECT DISTINCT indication, COUNT(*) as drug_count
FROM drug_entries
WHERE indication IS NOT NULL AND indication != ''
GROUP BY indication
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN icd_codes_raw IS NULL OR icd_codes_raw = '' OR icd_codes_raw = '[]' THEN 1 END) > 0
LIMIT 50
command:
